title: 20 Pack Aluminium Foil Trays with Lids 21.4x16x5cm/1000ml- Foil Food Containers for Food Storage, Baking, Roasting, Takeaway and Party (Pack of 20 with Lids)
features: Packaging and Dimensions: The package includes 20 foil trays with 20 reusable cardboard lids. Each foil pie dish measures 21.4x16x5cm/1000ml. It's deep and it weighs 19 grams.
Quality: Made from recyclable aluminium. Our catering trays sustain their shape while cooking. Their non-sticky texture and blunt edges make cooking hassle-free.

Multipurpose: These disposable trays can be used at parties, celebrations, and gatherings for broiling, baking cakes, pies, casseroles, cooking, storing, and serving. These foil baking trays are easy to untangle and store in your kitchen.
Preservations: Our takeaway containers with lids are used to preserve food items. You can send food to your guests and friends, preserved in these foil containers.

Clean and Reuse: Without worrying about cleaning, put foil takeaway containers with lids in the dishwasher and reuse them later. Scrub foil roasting trays gently to ensure that their shape is not altered.
